intro_cards.title: Very Casual Prohibition: ちゃいけない
intro_cards.body:
ちゃいけない is the most casual prohibition — a contraction of てはいけない.

Contraction:
• てはいけない → ちゃいけない

• そんなことしちゃいけないよ！(You can't do that!)
• 嘘ついちゃいけない。(Don't lie!)
• 見ちゃいけない。(Don't look!)

Very common in natural speech between friends and family.
Would not use in formal or polite situations.

Full form reminder:
食べてはいけない → 食べちゃいけない
